name: Fish Oil Heart Study
description: Major cardiovascular events for fish oil vs placebo in large trial (n=25,871). IMS Ch. 17.

context.nullClaim: fish oil has no effect on cardiovascular events

studyDescription: Results from a randomized controlled trial examining the effect of fish oil supplements on heart health. Participants were randomly assigned to receive fish oil or a placebo and followed for cardiovascular events over the study period.
sourceDetail: Manson, J.E. et al. (2019). "Marine n−3 Fatty Acids and Prevention of Cardiovascular Disease and Cancer." New England Journal of Medicine, 380(1), 23–32. Dataset from OpenIntro.
